basic_details.job_title: ACMS Delhi Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 16 Professor, Assistant and associate Professor Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Army College of Medical Sciences (ACMS), Delhi Cantt
basic_details.post_name: Professor / Associate Professor / Assistant Professor / Senior Resident
basic_details.short_information: ACMS is a private unaided institute inviting applications for contractual faculty posts.

qualification.details: Qualifications and experience as per NMC Regulations. All candidates must upload CV along with relevant documents (qualifications, experience, publications).

selection_process: Selection on merit after Interview by the Selection Board. No TA/DA will be paid.
how_to_apply: Prepare detailed CV with all relevant documents.
Send application to [email protected] by 31 July 2026.
Dean ACMS reserves the right to reject any application.
important_instructions: First year is probation period. No family accommodation available at present. Posts are tentative and subject to change. Contractual appointments only.

content_sections.heading: ACMS Delhi Faculty Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Army College of Medical Sciences (ACMS), Delhi Cantt has invited applications for contractual faculty positions. The notification includes details on vacancies, specialities, qualifications as per NMC Regulations, and application process. Candidates are strongly advised to read the full notification before applying. Download ACMS Delhi Faculty Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ACMS Faculty Recruitment 2026: Overview
content_sections.text: ACMS is a private unaided institute inviting applications for contractual faculty posts.

rows.army_college_of_medical_sciences_acms_de: Professor / Associate Professor / Assistant Professor / Senior Resident

content_sections.heading: ACMS Faculty - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Qualifications and experience as per NMC Regulations. All candidates must upload CV along with relevant documents (qualifications, experience, publications).

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection on merit after Interview by the Selection Board. No TA/DA will be paid.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for ACMS Delhi Faculty Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Prepare detailed CV with all relevant documents. Send application to [email protected] by 31 July 2026. Dean ACMS reserves the right to reject any application.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: First year is probation period. No family accommodation available at present. Posts are tentative and subject to change. Contractual appointments only.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for ACMS Faculty positions 2026?
Q2. How to apply for Army College of Medical Sciences Faculty Recruitment?
faq.answer: Send CV with documents to [email protected].

faq.question: Q3. What posts are available in ACMS Delhi Recruitment?
faq.answer: Professor, Associate Professor, Assistant Professor, and Senior Resident in various specialities.

faq.question: Q4. Is ACMS a government medical college?
faq.answer: No, it is a private unaided institute.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for ACMS Faculty?
faq.answer: Shortlisting based on CV followed by Interview by Selection Board.

faq.question: Q6. Will TA/DA be paid for ACMS Interview?
Q7. What qualifications are required for ACMS faculty posts?
faq.answer: As per NMC Regulations (details in notification).

faq.question: Q8. Is there any probation period in ACMS contractual appointment?
faq.answer: Yes, first year is probation period.
